member.name: T:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IDynamicMaskingPlugin
member.summary: A plugin interface for dynamic pin masking in plists execution.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IDynamicMaskingPlugin.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the plugin with the user's provided input.
member.param: The user's input from the "twin" parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IDynamicMaskingPlugin.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of dynamically stored pins to mask.
member.returns: The list of pins to mask.

member.name: T:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IFunctionalTestPlugin
member.summary: A plugin interface for to modify a IFunctionalTest's execution by extending the pre and post Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IFunctionalTestPlugin.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the plugin with the user's provided input.
member.param: The user's input from the "twin" parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IFunctionalTestPlugin.PreExecuteFunctionalTest(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Invocation of methods before the PatList Execure.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IFunctionalTestPlugin.PostExecuteFunctionalTest(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Invocation of methods after the PatList Execure.
member.returns: If the post execute fails or not. This is to allow different port. If it's a catastrophic failure, this would throw.

member.name: T:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IProcessCtvPerPinPlugin
member.summary: Interface for processing CTV (Capture Test Vector) per pin.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IProcessCtvPerPinPlugin.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the plugin with the user's provided input.
member.param: The user's input from the "twin" parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IProcessCtvPerPinPlugin.ProcessCtvPerPin(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureCtvPerPinTest)
member.summary: Processes the CTV data captured per pin by the provided test.
member.param: The test that captures the CTV data per pin.
member.returns: True if the processing is successful, otherwise false.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IProcessFailuresPlugin.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the plugin with the user's provided input.
member.param: The user's input from the "twin" parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.Plugins.Functional.IProcessFailuresPlugin.ProcessFailures(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest)
member.summary: Processes the failures captured by the provided test.
member.param: The test that captures the failures.
member.returns: True if the processing is successful, otherwise false.
